1t was in Guru-Guru-Guru.
5, 6. These offered important improvements in his carrer.
They coincide with Guru-Budha-Budha-Rahu and Budha
Shukra-Budha. The trine and sextile were favourable.
7. The square brought a substantial amount to clear his
obligations. The square was beneficial, like the trine. 1t was in
Shani -Rahu-Chandra.
8. 1t was a grand felicitation function in Budha-Budha
Guru. Budha is in Guru's house and Guru is exalted. The
tenth house is involved both ways.
9, 10. Shukra is the lord of the third which is the twelfth
from the fourth. The mother passed away in Budha-Shukra
Shani. Budha is in the Maraka house for the mother, and
Shukra in the twelfth from him has Saturn in square.
11. The opposition brought about a serious limitation in
his career; and this made him work hard for a better past. It
was in Guru-Ravi-Guru. Ravi and Guru have a near 6-8 rela
tion.
12. The sextile brought honour and recognition. This was
Budha-Budha-Ravi. The sextile was favourable.
